summary: Frontend-only verification of the new Level Test Audio admin panel (M2.3 Passo 2). Logged in as admin, navigated to /admin, clicked the 'Level Test Audio' tab and verified all rendering requirements: 6 slot cards (LAW/BIRD/TRAP × RP/AmE), each with correct word (law/bird/cat), correct dialect-specific IPA (LAW /lɔː/ RP, /lɔ/ US; BIRD /bɜːd/ RP, /bɝd/ US; TRAP /kæt/ both), 'DA GENERARE' state badges, upload input and 'Genera EL' button. GET /api/level-test/word-examples returns 200 with 6 slots all in state 'da_generare'. Did NOT click 'Genera EL' and did NOT upload any file per instructions.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminLevelTestAudioTab.jsx (141 lines) is clean, well-scoped and follows existing admin sub-tab pattern. No issues.

The dialect test-id uses 'RP' (not 'BrE') for the British variant, while the API returns 'dialect':'RP' and the UI badge shows '🇬🇧 RP' — consistent throughout the stack and matches the review request test-id spec (leveltest-slot-LAW-RP, ...-AmE).
seed_data_creation: none — verification was read-only (no generation, no upload) per instructions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Level Test Audio admin panel is present at /admin under the tab data-testid 'tab-leveltest-audio' → renders 'admin-leveltest-audio-tab' panel. 6 slot cards: leveltest-slot-{LAW|BIRD|TRAP}-{RP|AmE}. Each card has: leveltest-state-*, leveltest-upload-*, leveltest-generate-* test-ids. GET /api/level-test/word-examples returns the 6 canonical slots with state 'da_generare' when no audio has been uploaded/generated. Do NOT click 'Genera EL' during smoke tests — it will call the ElevenLabs API. Upload/generate flows are untested and should be verified explicitly when M2.3 Passo 3 is delivered.
